CREATE TABLE test_arrays (array1 FLOAT[], array2 FLOAT[]);
SELECT a.array1, a.array2, array_distance(a.array1, a.array2) AS distance FROM test_arrays AS a WHERE array_distance(a.array1, a.array2) > 1;
SELECT DISTINCT array_distance(array1, array2) FROM test_arrays WHERE array_distance(array1, array2) IS NOT NULL;
WITH distances AS (SELECT array_distance(array1, array2) AS distance FROM test_arrays) SELECT AVG(distance) FROM distances;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_arrays WHERE array_distance(array1, array2) > (SELECT AVG(array_distance(array1, array2)) FROM test_arrays);
